name: librizin0
title: librizin0
description:
libraries from the Rizin suite
Rizin is a fork of the radare2 reverse engineering framework with a
focus on usability, working features and code cleanliness.
.
Rizin is portable and it can be used to analyze binaries, disassemble
code, debug programs, as a forensics tool, as a scriptable command-line
hexadecimal editor able to open disk files, and much more!
.
This package provides the libraries from Rizin.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librizin0 because libraries from the Rizin suite.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librizin0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librizin0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librizin0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
